'''taposho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemonicon|mnemonicon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemonicon|mnemonicon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| taposho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpesheth|tæpesheth]] || [[word:tæpeshej|tæpeshej]] || [[word:tæpeshesh|tæpeshesh]] || [[word:tæpeshe|tæpeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapoposhoth|tapoposhoth]] || [[word:tapoposhoj|tapoposhoj]] || [[word:tapoposhosh|tapoposhosh]] || [[word:tapoposho|tapoposho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:taposhoth|taposhoth]] || [[word:taposhoj|taposhoj]] || [[word:taposhosh|taposhosh]] || [[word:taposho|taposho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapofshoth|tapofshoth]] || [[word:tapofshoj|tapofshoj]] || [[word:tapofshosh|tapofshosh]] || [[word:tapofshof|tapofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:taposhotho|taposhotho]] || [[word:taposhojo|taposhojo]] || [[word:taposhosho|taposhosho]] || [[word:taposhoko|taposhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:taposhoth|taposhoth]] || [[word:taposhoj|taposhoj]] || [[word:taposhosh|taposhosh]] || [[word:taposho|taposho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:taposhothol|taposhothol]] || [[word:taposhojol|taposhojol]] || [[word:taposhoshol|taposhoshol]] || [[word:taposhokol|taposhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:taposhothotho|taposhothotho]] || [[word:taposhojojo|taposhojojo]] || [[word:taposhoshosho|taposhoshosho]] || [[word:taposhoko|taposhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:taposhothon|taposhothon]] || [[word:taposhojon|taposhojon]] || [[word:taposhoshon|taposhoshon]] || [[word:taposhokon|taposhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:taposhothoro|taposhothoro]] || [[word:taposhojoro|taposhojoro]] || [[word:taposhoshoro|taposhoshoro]] || [[word:taposhokoro|taposhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
